Kingdom Sweeper

Hold the realm against the goblin invasion — every board solvable without a guess.
Rout the warbands, wake dragons, outwit wizards, and claim the treasure.

Choose Your Path

However you take the field, every board is solvable by pure logic.

Campaign
March through the realms — glades, rivers, keeps and calderas, each with its own foes and treasure.

Training Grounds
Drill the classic fields of the sweeper's trade, from squire to champion. Pure deduction — or invite the monsters in.

Choose Your Realm

Every realm is solvable by pure logic — tools and chests are a bonus.

Training Grounds

The classic drills — no story, no treasure, no mercy. Numbers and logic alone.
Flip it on and monsters spawn at random spots on the field — with fire and steel to match.
